title: Filing Period End Date
notes: The fiscal period end date for the filing, as reported in the SEC XBRL company facts API. This is the last day of the fiscal period covered by the filing.

title: Gross Profit
notes: Gross profit for the reporting period. Sourced from the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'GrossProfit' or equivalent.

title: Operating Expenses
notes: Total operating expenses for the reporting period. Sourced from the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'OperatingExpenses' or equivalent.

title: Weighted Avg Shares Outstanding (Basic)
notes: Weighted average number of basic shares outstanding for the period. Sourced from the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'WeightedAverageNumberOfSharesOutstandingBasic'.

title: Has Gross Profit
notes: Indicator if gross profit is available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Operating Income
notes: Indicator if operating income is available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Operating Expenses
notes: Indicator if operating expenses are available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Liabilities
notes: Indicator if liabilities are available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Revenue
notes: Indicator if revenue is available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Common Stock Outstanding
notes: Indicator if common stock shares outstanding is available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Has Weighted Avg Shares
notes: Indicator if weighted average shares outstanding is available for this filing (1 = available, 0 = not available).

title: Gross Profit (1-Period Lag)
notes: Gross profit from the immediately prior filing period for the same company.

title: Operating Income Loss (1-Period Lag)
notes: Operating income or loss from the immediately prior filing period for the same company.

title: Net Income Loss (1-Period Lag)
notes: Net income or loss from the immediately prior filing period for the same company.

title: Operating Expenses (1-Period Lag)
notes: Operating expenses from the immediately prior filing period for the same company.

title: Weighted Avg Shares Outstanding (Basic
variable_name: Weighted average number of basic shares outstanding from the immediately prior filing period for the same company.

title: SEC Filing Date
notes: The date on which the company submitted the filing to the SEC EDGAR system. Retrieved from the 'filed' field of the SEC XBRL company facts API (https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/). This may differ from the fiscal period end date, as companies have a grace period (40-60 days for 10-Q, 60-90 days for 10-K) after the period close to submit their filing.

title: Fiscal Year
notes: The fiscal year to which the filing pertains, as reported in the 'fy' field of the SEC XBRL company facts API. Note that a company's fiscal year may end on a date other than December 31. For example, a Q1 filing for fiscal year 2022 may be for the period ending March 31, 2022 but filed in May 2022.

title: SEC Form Type
notes: The SEC filing form type. '10-K' is an annual report filed once per fiscal year; '10-Q' is a quarterly report filed for Q1, Q2, and Q3 (Q4 is covered by the annual 10-K). Sourced from the 'form' field of the SEC XBRL company facts API. Only 10-K and 10-Q filings are included in this dataset.

title: Fiscal Period
notes: The fiscal reporting period within the fiscal year. Values are Q1 (first quarter), Q2 (first half / second quarter), Q3 (first three quarters / third quarter), Q4 (fourth quarter, typically reported in the 10-K as 'FY' — full year), or FY (full fiscal year as reported in the annual 10-K). Sourced from the 'fp' field of the SEC XBRL company facts API.

title: Company Name
notes: The full display name of the company as defined in the TARGET_TICKERS dictionary in the data pipeline (e.g. 'Uber', 'Upwork', 'DoorDash'). This is a human-readable label — for the official SEC registrant name see the EDGAR company facts API. Included as an identifier column alongside ticker and category.

title: Stock Ticker Symbol
notes: The exchange ticker symbol for the company (e.g. 'UBER', 'UPWK', 'DASH'). Defined in TARGET_TICKERS and cross-referenced against the official SEC ticker-to-CIK mapping retrieved from https://www.sec.gov/files/company_tickers.json. Used as the primary join key when merging with yfinance stock price data.

title: Company Category
notes: A researcher-assigned categorical label grouping companies by business model. 'gig' denotes gig-economy platforms (e.g. Uber, Upwork, Etsy); 'mlm' denotes multi-level marketing companies included for comparison (e.g. Herbalife, Primerica). Defined in TARGET_TICKERS in the data pipeline.

title: Total Assets
notes: Total assets as of the balance sheet date, representing all resources owned or controlled by the company. Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'Assets' (https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2023/elts/us-gaap-2023.htm). Sourced from the SEC XBRL company facts API in USD. For quarterly filings this reflects the balance sheet snapshot at period end; for annual filings it reflects the year-end balance sheet.

title: Common Stock Shares Outstanding
notes: The total number of common shares outstanding as of the filing date. Primarily sourced from the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'CommonStockSharesOutstanding'; gaps are backfilled using the DEI (Document and Entity Information) concept 'EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding' from the same filing. Can be combined with stock price data to estimate market capitalization.

title: Income Tax Expense (Benefit)
notes: Income tax expense or benefit for the reporting period. Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit'. Positive values indicate a tax expense (income taxes owed); negative values indicate a tax benefit (e.g. due to net operating loss carryforwards). For quarterly filings this is a year-to-date cumulative figure. Used as a component in EBITDA estimation.

title: Total Liabilities
notes: Total liabilities as of the balance sheet date, representing all obligations owed by the company. Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'Liabilities'. The difference between Assets and Liabilities equals StockholdersEquity under the accounting equation (Assets = Liabilities + Equity). Sourced from the SEC XBRL company facts API in USD.

title: Net Income (Loss)
notes: Net income or net loss for the reporting period after all expenses, interest, and taxes. Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'NetIncomeLoss'. Positive values indicate profitability; negative values indicate a net loss. For quarterly 10-Q filings this is a year-to-date cumulative figure as reported. Sourced from the SEC XBRL company facts API in USD.

title: Operating Income (Loss)
notes: Operating income or loss for the reporting period, representing earnings before interest and taxes (EBIT). Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'OperatingIncomeLoss'. Excludes non-operating items such as interest income/expense. For quarterly 10-Q filings this is a year-to-date cumulative figure as reported. A key input for EBITDA estimation.

title: Stockholders Equity
notes: Total stockholders' equity (net assets) as of the balance sheet date, equal to total assets minus total liabilities. Corresponds to the US-GAAP XBRL concept 'StockholdersEquity'. Can be negative if cumulative losses or share buybacks exceed paid-in capital. Sourced from the SEC XBRL company facts API in USD.

title: Revenue
notes: Total revenue for the reporting period. Coalesced from multiple US-GAAP XBRL revenue tags to ensure coverage across different companies and reporting eras: 'Revenues', 'RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax', 'RevenueRemainingPerformanceObligation', and others. The first non-null value across these tags is used via pandas combine_first() in the cleaning pipeline. For quarterly 10-Q filings this is a year-to-date cumulative figure.

title: Total Assets (1-Period Lag)
notes: Total assets from the immediately prior filing period for the same company, shifted by one observation within each company group. Fiscal periods are ordered Q1→Q2→Q3→FY for sorting purposes. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['Assets'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Common Stock Shares Outstanding (1-Period Lag)
notes: Common shares outstanding from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. Supports period-over-period share dilution and buyback analysis. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['CommonStockSharesOutstanding'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Income Tax Expense Benefit (1-Period Lag)
notes: Income tax expense or benefit from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Total Liabilities (1-Period Lag)
notes: Total liabilities from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['Liabilities'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Net Income Loss (1-Period Lag)
notes: Net income or loss from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. Supports period-over-period earnings trend analysis. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['NetIncomeLoss'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Operating Income Loss (1-Period Lag)
notes: Operating income or loss from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. Supports period-over-period operating performance trend analysis. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['OperatingIncomeLoss'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Stockholders Equity (1-Period Lag)
notes: Stockholders' equity from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. Supports period-over-period equity trend and book value analysis. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['StockholdersEquity'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().

title: Revenue (1-Period Lag)
notes: Revenue from the immediately prior filing period for the same company. Supports period-over-period revenue growth rate calculations. The first observation for each company will be NaN. Derived by applying groupby('company')['Revenue'].shift(1) in add_lagged_metrics().
